title: tigridia meleagris
intro: Tigridia meleagris, also known as the Mexican shell flower or tiger flower, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Tigridia meleagris include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Tigridia meleagris is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
